notes:
mây = cloud (the white/gray shapes in the sky).  

It’s an uncountable noun by itself, but you often add classifiers like đám mây (a cloud / a cluster of clouds) or tầng mây (a layer of clouds). Common pairings: trời mây, bầu trời đầy mây, mây đen (dark clouds), mây trắng (white clouds).  

In weather talk, mây often suggests less sun or possible rain. Don’t confuse it with sương mù (fog), which is closer to the ground.

translation.en: There are beautiful clouds in the sky.
There are white clouds in the sky.

notes_md:
**mây** = cloud (the white/gray shapes in the sky).  

It’s an uncountable noun by itself, but you often add classifiers like **đám mây** (a cloud / a cluster of clouds) or **tầng mây** (a layer of clouds). Common pairings: **trời mây**, **bầu trời đầy mây**, **mây đen** (dark clouds), **mây trắng** (white clouds).  

In weather talk, **mây** often suggests less sun or possible rain. Don’t confuse it with **sương mù** (fog), which is closer to the ground.

definitions.vi: Một khối lượng nhìn thấy được của hơi nước ngưng tụ bay trong khí quyển.
definitions.es: Una masa visible de vapor de agua condensado que flota en la atmósfera.
definitions.en: A visible mass of condensed water vapor floating in the atmosphere.

example.en: Today the sky has many clouds.
example.es: Hoy el cielo tiene muchas nubes.
example.vi: Trời hôm nay có nhiều mây.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Today the sky has many cloud so it is not very sunny.
I like watching cloud float in the sky every afternoon.
When traveling with friends, I see white cloud is very beautiful.
exampleSentences: Hôm nay trời có nhiều mây nên không nắng lắm.
Em thích ngắm mây bay trên bầu trời mỗi buổi chiều.
Khi đi du lịch cùng bạn, anh thấy mây trắng rất đẹp.
